content: Just finished building my first React app! The key is to think of useEffect as 'run this code AFTER the component appears on screen'. Game changer!
Hot take: CSS Grid is easier than Flexbox once you actually learn it. Flexbox = one direction. Grid = two directions. Use both together and you can build any layout.
Reminder: you don't need to know everything to start building. I built my first project knowing only HTML and CSS.
